notes: Core mechanics partially work but ghost movement is broken (they clip through walls due to flawed collision using pixel offsets misaligned with tile grid), player turn detection requires exact pixel alignment that rarely triggers, game over uses alert/reload, and ghosts don't properly navigate the maze making the game barely playable.
Core logic is present, but ghosts get permanently stuck due to a grid alignment bug on their starting Y coordinates, and the player cannot instantly reverse direction.

Core Pac-Man elements exist, but ghost AI and state handling are very incomplete, movement/collision logic is rough, and the overall result is only a basic approximation rather than a solid full game.
